## Commonly used clis
```shell

curl -i -H \
  "X-Ba-Token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Im9aQlNkcXFqIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0..J5CeFBTzGVxFALTpkPQe4P2RLhfJgPlXFFpBQuo12DBAmj1IpRyW81S29FXGRwGeGHgggeqDx9josHXZ8VitQs5SsE_ZGqQ-xK4YGkey5614g62uOCrzevfjZWMFsEBhyOfSIDFULwEjutmMWN3Y9Ag-I4Tr-JEN7EzYw22BxIcWPKVH0pOUoykJS9wlDBwTn-z7YRZyD1eXZoazrW5BKPdUdlsJO0QM-yfy_enyNj4ncjFjMAzkyYd10oIcAMGQ353iLU0dmwyAxW_9-HTsqSFGMnK5T9KvOsOud7dc8WXTQPgAcycMduHd4tKTcnsHJCFO5NNOMbzOFsq3WgWVXg" \
  "http://localhost:8034/v1/cart/items?user_id=test"; 
  echo "";

```

### Migration
Temporarily change the number in the `command` section of the `migration` service in `docker-compose.yml`.
A positive number indicates an up migration, while a negative number indicates a down migration.

```yaml
  command: [ "go", "run", "-tags", "migrate", "./cmd/migrate", "0"]
```
To migrate, run:
```shell
docker-compose run --rm migration
```
